Description: Generic 40-pin GPIO header connector (represents Raspberry Pi 5)
Air quality / gas sensor (DO + AO outputs)
N-channel logic-level power MOSFET – controls Fan 1 (GPIO23)
N-channel logic-level power MOSFET – controls Fan 2 (GPIO18)
Gate resistor for Q2 (GPIO18 → Q2 gate)
Gate resistor for Q1 (GPIO23 → Q1 gate)
